scripts.electron:dev: rimraf dist-electron && npm run compile:electron && concurrently "vite --port 5175" "wait-on -v -t 120000 -d 20000 http://localhost:5175 dist-electron/.electron-ready && npm run start:electron"
scripts.electron:dev:openclaw: npm run openclaw:runtime:host && npm run electron:dev
scripts.pack: npm run setup:python-runtime && npm run build && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run setup:python-runtime && npm run build && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder
scripts.predist:mac: npm run build && npm run compile:electron && npm run openclaw:runtime:mac-arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && npm run compile:electron && npm run openclaw:runtime:mac-x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && npm run compile:electron && npm run openclaw:runtime:mac-arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:universal: npm run build && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder --mac --universal
scripts.dist:win: npm run setup:mingit && npm run setup:python-runtime && npm run predist:win && npm run build && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run compile:electron && electron-builder --linux
scripts.openclaw:runtime:mac-arm64: node scripts/install-openclaw-runtime.cjs mac-arm64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs mac-arm64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions:local && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:mac-x64: node scripts/install-openclaw-runtime.cjs mac-x64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs mac-x64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions:local && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:win-x64: node scripts/install-openclaw-runtime.cjs win-x64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs win-x64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions:local && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:win-arm64: node scripts/install-openclaw-runtime.cjs win-arm64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs win-arm64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions:local && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:linux-x64: node scripts/install-openclaw-runtime.cjs linux-x64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs linux-x64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions:local && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:linux-arm64: node scripts/install-openclaw-runtime.cjs linux-arm64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs linux-arm64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions:local && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:prune
